mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(SUM(IF(, d.last_value, NULL)), 1) FROM site s JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT id_site FROM device WHERE `status` = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND is_excluded_meter = 0 ) meter ON meter.id_site = s.id JOIN device d ON d.id_site = s.id WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND IF(meter.id_site IS NOT NULL, d.id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0, d.id_device_type = 1)
